name: Tiny Dino
description: A small, curious, and playful baby dinosaur who explores the world with wide-eyed wonder.

appearance.size: small - roughly the size of a golden retriever puppy

eyes.color: big black pupils with white sparkle highlights

appearance.teeth: tiny rounded nubs - not scary at all
appearance.tail: short stubby tail that wags when happy
appearance.arms: very small arms that flail when excited
appearance.legs: short chubby legs, slightly wobbly when walking
appearance.skin_texture: smooth with subtle scales, slightly glossy
features: tiny nostrils that flare when curious

personality.voice_description: high-pitched squeaks, chirps, and happy roars - no human language
personality.communication: expressive body language, eye expressions, vocalizations
personality.humor_style: physical comedy, unexpected reactions, over-the-top expressions, slapstick

prompt_presets.base_description: Tiny Dino, a small baby tyrannosaurus rex, bright green body with light yellow belly, large expressive round eyes with sparkle highlights, tiny rounded teeth, short stubby tail, small chubby arms, smooth glossy skin with subtle scales and soft rounded spikes along back, cute and adorable, cartoon style, high quality 3D render

style_modifiers.default: 3D Pixar-style animation, soft lighting, vibrant colors, 720x1280 vertical format
style_modifiers.emotional: exaggerated facial expression, close-up on face
style_modifiers.environment: rich detailed background, depth of field

mood_modifiers.happy: jumping with joy, tail wagging, eyes sparkling
mood_modifiers.curious: head tilted, leaning forward, nose sniffing
mood_modifiers.scared: trembling, wide eyes, hiding behind object
mood_modifiers.surprised: jaw dropped, eyes bulging, frozen in place
mood_modifiers.silly: goofy grin, crossed eyes, playful stance
